focus: v0.34 premium design pass — ROUND 4 step 4 (cloud-lane hide rule, Decision 8) DONE + keyed/keyless CDP-smoked + offline 531 passed. The 337-model OpenRouter dropdown + the '$0 OpenRouter spend' rail tile now stay HIDDEN until an OPENROUTER_API_KEY is wired, so a keyless founding-25 customer no longer sees 337 cloud models they can't run on first-run; a keyed box (the dev cockpit) is UNCHANGED. Single data-driven seam — has_key, NO new 'Field Edition mode' flag — which sidesteps the step-3 redirect dilemma (/arena/ is the shared dev cockpit): the gate keys off real key-presence so it Just Works on the operator's daily driver. Server (server.py api_compare_options): sends EMPTY openrouter + openrouter_groups arrays (and skips the catalog fetch + its curated FALLBACK entirely — the fallback was the real leak: _openrouter_models_for_ui returned curated cloud models even keyless) when no key; the chat+compare dropdowns then render only the 'Local · Spark' optgroup via their EXISTING per-group .length>0 guards (zero ChatLane/CompareDuel edits) and the 'all N' toggle drops out. _build_payload carries a new openrouter_enabled telemetry flag. Rail (TelemetryRail.astro): the spend cell starts hidden; SSE reveal hidden=(t.openrouter_enabled===false) shows it only on a keyed box (absent flag → shown, so the marketing demo is unaffected). Decision 8 part (a) 'Models pane = Advisor-only' needs NO new code (repo_root pin → customer local = just their Advisor). CDP smoke both states green; box restored to keyed. Lands in fieldkit [Unreleased] + baked _webui → ships on next fieldkit-curator release.
